'''zhajada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ceasing|ceasing]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-j-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ceasing|ceasing]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| zhajada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæjædæth|zhæjædæth]] || [[word:zhæjædæj|zhæjædæj]] || [[word:zhæjædæsh|zhæjædæsh]] || [[word:zhæjædæ|zhæjædæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhajajadath|zhajajadath]] || [[word:zhajajadaj|zhajajadaj]] || [[word:zhajajadash|zhajajadash]] || [[word:zhajajada|zhajajada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhajadath|zhajadath]] || [[word:zhajadaj|zhajadaj]] || [[word:zhajadash|zhajadash]] || [[word:zhajada|zhajada]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhajafdath|zhajafdath]] || [[word:zhajafdaj|zhajafdaj]] || [[word:zhajafdash|zhajafdash]] || [[word:zhajafdaf|zhajafdaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhajadatha|zhajadatha]] || [[word:zhajadaja|zhajadaja]] || [[word:zhajadasha|zhajadasha]] || [[word:zhajadaka|zhajadaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhajadath|zhajadath]] || [[word:zhajadaj|zhajadaj]] || [[word:zhajadash|zhajadash]] || [[word:zhajada|zhajada]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhajadathal|zhajadathal]] || [[word:zhajadajal|zhajadajal]] || [[word:zhajadashal|zhajadashal]] || [[word:zhajadakal|zhajadakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhajadathatha|zhajadathatha]] || [[word:zhajadajaja|zhajadajaja]] || [[word:zhajadashasha|zhajadashasha]] || [[word:zhajadaka|zhajadaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhajadathan|zhajadathan]] || [[word:zhajadajan|zhajadajan]] || [[word:zhajadashan|zhajadashan]] || [[word:zhajadakan|zhajadakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhajadathaoro|zhajadathaoro]] || [[word:zhajadajaoro|zhajadajaoro]] || [[word:zhajadashaoro|zhajadashaoro]] || [[word:zhajadakaoro|zhajadakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|806ef69}}
